title: Class VI automated laser projector

The [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] '''Class VI automated laser projector''' was an [[automated laser trap]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] in the detention blocks of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].

==Description==
The Class VI automated laser projector was a wall mounted device that was comprised of a small [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]], a control [[Computer/Legends|computer]], and a [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] suite. The [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannon could be controlled manually by an operator, or by the computer. The integrated sensors were capable of tracking up to two dozen separate targets.<ref name="EGWT" />

The blaster cannon was capable of rotating forty-five degrees in any direction and had the same stopping power as a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] bolt. The Class VI also had a setting to fire high-energy [[Stun/Legends|stun]] blasts. Internal [[Power cell/Legends|power cells]] gave the weapon enough ammunition for fifty shots, on it could wired into a [[Power generator/Legends|power generator]] for unlimited capacity. The [[Laser/Legends|laser]] trap had an optimum range of ten [[Meter/Legends|meters]], and a maximum range of twenty-five meters.<ref name="EGWT" />

The Class VI had a scanner that read coded [[identification chip]]s which allowed access to restricted areas for authorized personnel. Individuals entering a secure area were scanned, and the laser projector could alert nearby control officers and [[Security guard/Legends|security guards]] to unauthorized personnel.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
Class VI automated laser projectors were a common security feature used throughout the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], usually as part of a larger security system including [[Force field/Legends|force fields]], [[Security camera/Legends|security cameras]], and [[weapon detector]]s. They were common sights at security checkpoints, labor camps, and [[Prison/Legends|prisons]].<ref name="EGWT" />

Multiple laser projectors were used for increased coverage, and were either wall-mounted, installed on rotating turrets that were suspended from the ceiling, or hidden behind retractable panels. They were usually linked to [[Security camera/Legends|security cameras]] like the [[57C holocam]] to provide additional targeting data to the projector's computer.<ref name="EGWT" />

The Empire installed several Class VI automated laser projectors throughout [[Detention Block AA-23/Legends|Detention Block AA-23]] aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]].<ref name="EGWT" />

==Behind the scenes==
This weapon has a remarkable similarity to [[Laser trip mine/Legends|trip mines]]. This was most likely the inspiration for the design of them.
